title: Linear combinations of random variables
summary: 9709 S2 — E(aX+bY), Var(aX+bY), and sums of independent normals.
learningObjectives: Calculate variance of aX + bY for independent variables.
Find distributions of sums of normal variables.
Solve exam problems involving linear combinations.

simpleExplanation.title: Combining X and Y
simpleExplanation.summary: Expectation is always linear. Variance of a sum adds only when X and Y are independent.
steps: Var(aX + bY) = a²Var(X) + b²Var(Y) if independent.
X + Y normal if X, Y independent normals.

sections.content: **Linear combinations** (6.2) appear with **normal distribution** tables. State **independence** before adding variances.
